data.name: InvalidTestApplicationBuilderType
data.value: TRX report generator only works with builders of type 'Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.TestApplicationBuilder'
data.comment: Do not localize {Locked="Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.TestApplicationBuilder"}.

data.name: TrxComparerToolBaselineFileOptionDescription
data.value: The baseline TRX file
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--baseline-trx"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxComparerToolBothFilesMustBeSpecified
data.value: '--{0}' and '--{1}' must both be specified
data.comment: 0 is the first option name without the leading {Locked="--"}. 1 is the second option name without the leading {Locked="--"}.

data.name: TrxComparerToolDescription
data.value: This tool allows to compare and highlights differences between 2 TRX reports
data.comment: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxComparerToolDisplayName
data.value: TRX comparer tool
data.comment: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxComparerToolOptionExpectsSingleArgument
data.value: '--{0}' expects a single trx file path as argument
data.comment: 0 is the option name without the leading {Locked="--"}. Do not localize file extension {Locked=".trx"}.

data.name: TrxComparerToolOtherFileOptionDescription
data.value: The TRX file to compare with the baseline
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--trx-to-compare"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxFileExistsAndWillBeOverwritten
data.value: Warning: Trx file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.
data.comment: {0} is the {Locked="TRX"} report file path.

data.name: TrxReportArtifactDescription
data.value: Test session

data.name: TrxReportArtifactDisplayName
data.value: TRX Report
data.comment: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxReportFileNameExtensionIsNotTrx
data.value: '--report-trx-filename' file name argument must end with '.trx' (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example command {Locked="--report-trx-filename myreport.trx"}.

data.name: TrxReportFileNameOptionDescription
data.value: The name of the generated TRX report. May include a relative or absolute path; relative paths are resolved against the test results directory and missing directories are created. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {arch} (process architecture), {time} (timestamp). Example: MyReport_{tfm}.trx
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, format name {Locked="TRX"}, placeholder tokens {Locked="{pname}"}{Locked="{pid}"}{Locked="{asm}"}{Locked="{tfm}"}{Locked="{arch}"}{Locked="{time}"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example file name {Locked="MyReport_{tfm}.trx"}.

data.name: TrxReportFileNameRequiresTrxReport
data.value: '--report-trx-filename' requires '--report-trx' to be enabled
data.comment: Do not localize option names {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}{Locked="--report-trx"}.

data.name: TrxReportFileNameShouldNotContainPath
data.value: file name argument must not contain path (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example command {Locked="--report-trx-filename myreport.trx"}.

data.name: TrxReportFileNameMustNotBeEmpty
data.value: '--report-trx-filename' file name part must not be empty (e.g. --report-trx-filename myreport.trx)
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example command {Locked="--report-trx-filename myreport.trx"}.

data.name: TrxReportFileNameRelativePathMustStayUnderResultsDirectory
data.value: '--report-trx-filename' relative paths must stay under the test results directory (e.g. --report-trx-filename nested/myreport.trx)
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".trx"}, or example path {Locked="nested/myreport.trx"}.

data.name: TrxReportFrameworkDoesNotSupportTrxReportCapability
data.value: The test framework '{0}' with UID '{1}' does not support the 'ITrxReportCapability' leading to missing or incomplete TRX reports
data.comment: 0 is the test framework display name. 1 is the test framework {Locked="UID"}. Do not localize {Locked="ITrxReportCapability"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxReportGeneratorBeforeTestHostProcessStartAsyncNotCalled
data.value: Method 'BeforeTestHostProcessStartAsync' must be called before 'OnTestHostProcessStartedAsync'
data.comment: Do not localize method names {Locked="BeforeTestHostProcessStartAsync"}{Locked="OnTestHostProcessStartedAsync"}.

data.name: TrxReportGeneratorDescription
data.value: Produce a TRX report for the current test session
data.comment: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxReportGeneratorDisplayName
data.value: TRX report generator
data.comment: Do not localize format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: TrxReportGeneratorMissingTrxNamedPipeEnvironmentVariable
data.value: Required environment variable '{0}' is missing for TRX report generator
data.comment: {0} is the environment variable name.

data.name: TrxReportIsNotValidForDiscovery
data.value: '--report-trx' cannot be enabled when using '--list-tests'
data.comment: Do not localize option names {Locked="--report-trx"}{Locked="--list-tests"}.

data.name: TrxReportOptionDescription
data.value: Enable generating TRX report
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-trx"} or format name {Locked="TRX"}.

data.name: UnsupportedRequestTypeErrorMessage
data.value: Requests of type '{0}' is not supported
data.comment: {0} is the unsupported request type name.
